title: The Free 30-Day Blood Pressure Reset Challenge Starts May 1
author: Joel Polley
body:
The Free 30-Day Blood Pressure Reset Challenge Starts May 1

On May 1, we're launching a free cohort-based challenge that's going to change how you think about blood pressure management.

No credit card. No catch. Just the protocol I'd give family — delivered to your inbox every single day for 30 days, with a community of people doing it alongside you.

What You Get — Free

  • Daily protocol emails — one actionable step delivered to your inbox every day for 30 days
  • Community support — join our Skool group and connect with others doing the reset with you
  • Your BP archetype — identify which pattern is driving YOUR numbers
  • The complete 4-week framework — from baseline to doctor conversation

The 4-Week Breakdown

Week 1: Baseline & Awareness
We start by getting clear on YOUR baseline. Blood pressure isn't one-size-fits-all, and neither is the fix. You'll track your patterns, identify your triggers, and get a personalized assessment.

Week 2: The Protocol
This is where the reset begins. You'll introduce the evidence-backed protocol designed to address the root mechanisms driving elevated BP — precise steps, delivered daily.

Week 3: Lifestyle Integration
The protocol works best when lifestyle supports it. Week 3 focuses on the behaviors that matter: sleep quality, stress resilience, movement patterns, and how to handle real-world stressors without spiking your pressure.

Week 4: Doctor Conversation
By Week 4, many people are ready to have a different conversation with their doctor. We'll prepare you with your data, your protocol, and the language to discuss what's working and whether medication adjustments make sense.

Know Your Archetype

Not all high blood pressure is the same. Neither are the fixes. During the challenge, you'll identify your BP archetype:

  • The Cortisol Storm — Stress-driven spikes, racing thoughts, tension headaches
  • The Insulin Rebel — Metabolic resistance, weight distribution shifts, morning sluggishness
  • The Estrogen Shift — Hormonal fluctuations, migraines, hot flashes, BP swings
  • The Pressure Phoenix — Long-standing elevation, medication resistance, genetic predisposition
  • The Thyroid Ghost — Metabolism gone quiet, fatigue, weight creep, BP elevation

Your archetype determines YOUR protocol. That's why this works.

Want More? Upgrade Anytime.

The free challenge gives you everything you need to start. But if you want live coaching and extras, two upgrade options are available at any point during the 30 days:

VIP — $97

  • Everything free, plus:
  • Weekly live group coaching — Mondays at 10pm EST with Joel
  • The BP Reset book (digital) — the complete protocol reference
  • Direct Q&A during live sessions

Premium — $297

  • Everything VIP, plus:
  • Virtual ticket to Barbara O'Neill LIVE wellness session

Who This Is For

You're a fit if:

  • You have elevated blood pressure and want to address it naturally
  • You're on medication but your numbers still aren't where they should be
  • You're curious about the root causes your doctor hasn't discussed
  • You want a concrete 30-day protocol with real accountability
  • You're ready to invest time in your cardiovascular health

You're probably not a fit if:

  • You have a blood pressure emergency or crisis (get to an ER)
  • You're looking for a quick fix without any effort on your part
  • You distrust herbs or natural approaches on principle

Join Free — Starts May 1

Enter your email in the banner at the top of this page to lock in your spot. You'll get a welcome email with your Skool community link and everything you need to be ready on Day 1.

Next cohort starts May 1. The protocol is free. The community is free. Just show up.
